task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Canon EOS R6 Mark II (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2499.00 and wholesale is $1749.00. Product features: Full-frame mirrorless camera with 24.2MP sensor and 40fps burst shooting. Reference: https://www.usa.canon.com/cameras/eos-r6-mark-ii

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Canon EOS R6 Mark II. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Canon EOS R6 Mark II. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
